steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a similarity between two authors. The notes show both Jean Toomer and Herman Melville share one key fact: works by each recently entered the public domain.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "*Cane*, a novel by Jean Toomer, entered the public domain in 2019, unlike Herman Melville's novella *Billy Budd, Sailor*.": Uses contrasting language — highlights a difference, not a similarity. ✗
  • "Both *Cane* and *Billy Budd, Sailor* are in the public domain; however, one is a novel and the other a novella.": Distinguishes the two authors by genre — a difference, not a similarity. ✗
  • "The year was 2020, and the copyright to Herman Melville's *Billy Budd, Sailor* had finally expired.": Discusses only one author, so no comparison is made. ✗
  • "Jean Toomer and Herman Melville are two authors whose works recently entered the public domain.": Identifies the shared characteristic and applies it to both authors. ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
